title: Uterine Transplantation: Surgical Stages, Preservation Techniques, and Post-Transplant Care
author: Archana Singh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Introduction   
  A uterine transplantis a surgical procedure in which a healthy uterus is transplanted into a female patient whose uterus is either absent or diseased. This cutting-edge procedure offers hope for women who suffer from Absolute Uterine Factor Infertility (AUFI), a condition where the absence or abnormality of the uterus prevents normal embryonic implantation, rendering the woman infertile.
steps_raw:
Introduction   
  A uterine transplantis a surgical procedure in which a healthy uterus is transplanted into a female patient whose uterus is either absent or diseased. This cutting-edge procedure offers hope for women who suffer from Absolute Uterine Factor Infertility (AUFI), a condition where the absence or abnormality of the uterus prevents normal embryonic implantation, rendering the woman infertile.
